title: Chomelia cinerea
taxonomy: Chomelia cinerea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Chomelia, which is a group of tropical plants. Chomelia cinerea is native to tropical regions and is characterized by its white or cream-colored flowers. The classification of Chomelia cinerea is further supported by its unique leaf and stem morphology. Within the Rubiaceae family, Chomelia cinerea is considered to be a member of the tribe Psychotrieae.
